title: Saving a robot configuration
description:
Saving a robot configuration

Saving robot calibration data

You can save and load individual robot calibration files. This is useful for moving a robot from one controller to another. When you save calibration data, a file is created with an MPD file extension. This file contains Hofs and CalPls values.

To save robot calibration data

Select
	 [System Configuration] from the [Setup] menu.

Select
	 [Controller]-[Robots]-[Robot**]-[Calibration].

Ensure
	 that the robot serial number is correct. The serial number will be
	 used to create the default file name. It is recommended that the serial
	 number be used.

Click
	 the [Save] button. Specify the destination directory and click the
	 [Save] button.
